meta.title: Join the best online BCA in Data Science & Analytics Program
meta.description: Build your tech career with the BCA in Data Science & Analytics program at Teksversity. Learn programming, AI, and big data analytics through online BCA classes.

mainEntity.name: What is the scope of BCA in Data Science and Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA in Data Science and Analytics program offers excellent career opportunities in IT, finance, healthcare, and e-commerce. Graduates can work as Data Analysts, AI Engineers, Machine Learning Specialists, and Business Intelligence Developers in India and abroad.

mainEntity.name: What are the top job roles after BCA in Data Science and Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: After completing BCA in Data Science, students can work as Data Scientists, Data Engineers, Business Analysts, Machine Learning Engineers, Data Visualization Experts, and Python Developers in both private and government sectors.

mainEntity.name: What is the average starting salary after BCA in Data Science and Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average starting salary for BCA Data Science graduates in India ranges between ₹4 LPA to ₹8 LPA, depending on the candidate’s skills, certifications, and company profile. Global placements offer even higher packages.

mainEntity.name: Is BCA in Data Science a good career choice in 2025 and beyond?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Data Science is one of the fastest-growing tech fields globally. By 2025, demand for AI, machine learning, and analytics professionals is expected to grow by 30–40%, making this one of the best career-oriented programs after 12th.

mainEntity.name: Can BCA Data Science graduates work abroad?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, BCA Data Science graduates can work abroad, especially if they earn international certifications like Python, Power BI, AWS, or Azure Data Analytics. Many multinational companies hire Indian graduates for data-driven roles globally.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide placement support for BCA Data Science students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Teksversity offers 100% placement assistance through recruiter tie-ups, career workshops, resume building, mock interviews, and LinkedIn optimization to help students secure top positions in IT and analytics companies.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide demo classes for BCA in Data Science?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students can attend free demo sessions to understand the learning experience, syllabus coverage, and faculty teaching style before enrolling in the BCA Data Science and Analytics program.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer internships or live projects during the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students get hands-on exposure through industry projects, data visualization assignments, and internships that help them build practical skills in Python, Power BI, and data modeling.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide certification support with the BCA Data Science course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Teksversity provides training and certification support for Python, Machine Learning, Power BI, and Data Analytics tools, which strengthen student profiles for job placements.

mainEntity.name: Why should I choose Teksversity for BCA in Data Science and Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers an industry-aligned curriculum, expert mentors, flexible learning options, live projects, global certification guidance, and dedicated placement support, making it one of the best platforms for tech-focused careers.

heading: Overview of the
BCA in Data Science & Analytics Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Future in Data and Digital Intelligence
overViewOfOnline.description: The BCA in Data Science & Analytics program at Teksversity is designed to create data-driven professionals who can turn raw information into actionable insights. This undergraduate course combines computer applications with advanced analytics, providing learners with strong foundations in programming, statistics, machine learning, and data visualization. Students learn to solve real business problems using AI and predictive analytics through a balance of theory and hands-on practice. With interactive online BCA classes, coding labs, and live industry projects, learners gain the technical and analytical expertise needed to excel in IT, finance, marketing, and research sectors.
keyPoints: Understand core concepts of programming, statistics, and analytics.
Learn to design and develop data-driven applications
Gain hands-on expertise with Python, R, SQL, and visualization tools

heading: Why Choose BCA in Data Science & Analytics
Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity means joining one of the best online BCA programs designed to integrate computer science fundamentals with modern data science applications. Every module focuses on practical learning through real-world datasets, coding challenges, and guided projects supervised by expert mentors.

description.firstDescription: The curriculum emphasizes experiential learning, allowing students to apply algorithms, create predictive models, and understand data interpretation. Through project-based learning, continuous assessments, and interactive labs, learners develop confidence in working in live analytics environments.

description.secondDescription: Beyond academics, Teksversity provides complete career support from technical mentorship to placement guidance. Resume workshops, interview preparation, and access to top recruiters ensure that students are career-ready upon graduation.

keyPoints: Practical coding sessions and AI workshops
Hands-on data science and analytics labs
Live projects with real business datasets
Machine learning and data visualization practice
Expert career mentorship for tech domains
Expert webinars and live Q&A sessions
Alumni success talks and career insights

downloadOurCourseBrochure.description: Get complete insights into the BCA in Data Science & Analytics program at Teksversity your pathway to becoming a data-driven technology professional. Explore how our online BCA classes blend academic excellence with real-time project-based learning.

heading: Amity University Online
Admission Process
OnlineAdmissionProcedure.description: The admission procedure for Amity Online generally takes place two times a year. The admission procedure for Amity Online generally takes place twice a year. The first admission cycle starts in January, and the second admission cycle takes place in July. The whole admission process from registration to admission confirmation takes place in online mode. No entrance exam is required for taking admission to the university.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
